creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% zgrep -C 1 ^http /usr/local/man/man1/svn.1.gz
For more information about the Subversion project, visit 
http://subversion.apache.org.

--
approaches and reasonings, etc., can be found at 
http://svnbook.red-bean.com/.

% 


In the online representation at www.freebsd.org, the first of the two URLs above is hyphenated, the resulting link is wrong: 

<http://subver-/>
